_meta.keyKnowledge: We investigate how data is transmitted and secured in wired and wireless networks, including the internet.

_source.w: We investigate how data is transmitted and secured in wired and wireless networks, including the internet.
y: Understanding data transmission and network security is essential in our connected world.
Knowing how networks work helps us understand both the capabilities and vulnerabilities of digital systems.
Network knowledge is foundational for cybersecurity and many technology careers.
eg: We investigate how data packets travel across the internet using TCP/IP protocols.
We compare the characteristics of wired and wireless network technologies.
We explore how encryption protects data during transmission.
We investigate how firewalls, VPNs and HTTPS keep network communications secure.
We trace the path of a web request from browser to server and back.
We discuss the security implications of public Wi-Fi networks versus private networks.
